title: Kitale、Trans Nzoia — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Kitale、Trans Nzoia的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Kitale是Trans Nzoia的一個城市，人口約220,000。An agricultural town in western Kenya, known for its flower farms, maize production, and nearby national parks.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
